title: Incredibly Crispy Moroccan Tofu Skewers
description: A sweet and crispy Moroccan dish featuring marinated tofu, perfect for a festive occasion, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, honey, paprika, cumin, coriander, and turmeric.
Add the tofu cubes to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut the puff pastry into strips about 1 inch wide and 3 inches long.
Wrap each tofu cube with a strip of puff pastry, brushing the edges with a little water to seal.
Place the tofu skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers for 20 minutes, or until the puff pastry is golden brown and crispy.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
